texto: A no hurts but a broken promise hurts more, Listening to a no is not easy but a shattered wish stabs more! Don't ever promise anything that you will not be able to give, BECAUSE THE HEART BREAKS INTO A ZILLION PIECES WHEN PEOPLE PROMISE BUT DON'T GIVE .
autor: Akanksha Wadhavkar( Motivational poems for starlit souls)
explicacao: Citação de Akanksha Wadhavkar( Motivational poems for starlit souls) sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “A no hurts but a broken promise hurts more, Listening to a no is not easy but a shattered wish st…” articula motivacao, inspiration, motivation em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e motivation.
